requirement_topic.en: UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 Transport Safety — Sea Freight to Port Vila; IMDG Code Compliance for Lithium Battery BESS Imports to Vanuatu
requirement_topic.zh: UN 38.3和IEC 62281运输安全——海运至维拉港；瓦努阿图锂电池BESS进口IMDG规则合规
requirement_topic.zht: UN 38.3和IEC 62281運輸安全——海運至維拉港；萬那杜鋰電池BESS進口IMDG規則合規

summary.en: UN 38.3 (Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods — Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3) specifies eight mandatory transport safety tests (T1 Altitude Simulation, T2 Thermal Test, T3 Vibration, T4 Shock, T5 External Short Circuit, T6 Impact/Crush, T7 Overcharge, T8 Forced Discharge) for lithium metal and lithium-ion cells and batteries of all sizes including cells, modules, and battery packs used in stationary BESS. Since January 1, 2020, a UN 38.3 Test Summary is mandatory documentation accompanying lithium battery shipments under international transport regulations (IMDG Code, IATA DGR). IEC 62281 (Safety of Primary and Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries During Transport) provides complementary transport safety requirements for lithium cells. Vanuatu imports BESS equipment primarily by sea freight via Port Vila (Port Vila Commercial Port). The IMDG Code (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code) applies to all sea freight of lithium batteries and is the primary transport regulation governing BESS shipments from China to Vanuatu. Vanuatu is a party to international maritime conventions; no Vanuatu-specific exemption from UN 38.3 or IMDG requirements exists. Sea voyage distances and Pacific conditions (tropical heat, humidity, vessel motion) impose additional stress on BESS cells during transit — shipping packaging must be designed for extended sea freight exposure, not only short-haul air freight conditions.
summary.zh: UN 38.3（危险货物运输建议书——测试和标准手册第三部分第38.3节）规定了所有尺寸锂金属和锂离子电芯及电池——包括固定式BESS中使用的电芯、模组和电池包——的8项强制运输安全测试（T1高度模拟、T2热测试、T3振动、T4冲击、T5外部短路、T6冲击/挤压、T7过充电、T8强制放电）。自2020年1月1日起，UN 38.3测试摘要是国际运输法规（IMDG规则、IATA DGR）下锂电池货物必须随附的强制文件。IEC 62281（运输过程中原生和二次锂电芯及电池的安全）为锂电芯提供补充运输安全要求。瓦努阿图的BESS设备进口主要通过维拉港（维拉港商业港）海运。IMDG规则（国际海运危险货物规则）适用于所有锂电池的海运，是管控从中国运往瓦努阿图BESS货物的主要运输法规。瓦努阿图加入国际海事公约；不存在针对UN 38.3或IMDG要求的瓦努阿图专项豁免。海上航行距离及太平洋条件（热带高温、高湿、船体运动）在运输过程中对BESS电芯构成额外应力——运输包装须针对长途海运暴露进行设计，而不仅仅满足短途航空货运条件。
summary.zht: UN 38.3（危險貨物運輸建議書——測試和標準手冊第三部分第38.3節）規定了所有尺寸鋰金屬和鋰離子電芯及電池——包括固定式BESS中使用的電芯、模組和電池包——的8項強制運輸安全測試（T1高度模擬、T2熱測試、T3振動、T4衝擊、T5外部短路、T6衝擊/擠壓、T7過充電、T8強制放電）。自2020年1月1日起，UN 38.3測試摘要是國際運輸法規（IMDG規則、IATA DGR）下鋰電池貨物必須隨附的強制文件。IEC 62281（運輸過程中原生和二次鋰電芯及電池的安全）為鋰電芯提供補充運輸安全要求。萬那杜的BESS設備進口主要通過維拉港（維拉港商業港）海運。IMDG規則（國際海運危險貨物規則）適用於所有鋰電池的海運，是管控從中國運往萬那杜BESS貨物的主要運輸法規。萬那杜加入國際海事公約；不存在針對UN 38.3或IMDG要求的萬那杜專項豁免。海上航行距離及太平洋條件（熱帶高溫、高濕、船體運動）在運輸過程中對BESS電芯構成額外應力——運輸包裝須針對長途海運暴露進行設計，而不僅僅滿足短途航空貨運條件。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 — Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods, Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 (mandatory transport safety tests T1–T8 for all lithium cells and batteries)
IEC 62281:2019 — Safety of Primary and Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries During Transport (complementary transport safety standard for lithium cells)
IMDG Code — International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code (primary regulation governing sea freight of lithium batteries to Vanuatu via Port Vila)
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR) — applies to air freight of lithium batteries including BESS cells and modules (if air freight used for smaller components)
UN Model Regulations, 7th revised edition (2021) — Test Summary requirement in force since January 1, 2020

summary.en: Chinese BESS cell and module manufacturers are required to comply with UN 38.3 for export shipments under international transport conventions. Chinese manufacturers typically hold UN 38.3 test reports and test summaries from CNAS-accredited testing laboratories such as UL, SGS, Bureau Veritas, TÜV, or CAICT. IEC 62281 compliance is also commonly demonstrated by Chinese BESS exporters for international shipments. The UN 38.3 Test Summary (required since January 1, 2020) must cover the specific cell or battery type being shipped. A Chinese-origin UN 38.3 test summary from an accredited laboratory is acceptable for Vanuatu-bound sea freight under the IMDG Code — the key gaps are documentation scope and currency, and ensuring packaging is adequate for long-distance Pacific sea freight (higher humidity, temperature cycling, extended voyage duration) rather than short-haul conditions.
summary.zh: 中国BESS电芯和模组制造商须依据国际运输公约对出口货物遵守UN 38.3。中国制造商通常持有来自CNAS认可测试实验室（如UL、SGS、Bureau Veritas、TÜV或CAICT）的UN 38.3测试报告和测试摘要。中国BESS出口商通常也针对国际货运提供IEC 62281合规证明。自2020年1月1日起要求的UN 38.3测试摘要须涵盖所运输的特定电芯或电池类型。来自认可实验室的中国产地UN 38.3测试摘要可用于依据IMDG规则运往瓦努阿图的海运货物——主要差距在于文件范围和时效性，以及确保包装适合长途太平洋海运（更高湿度、温度循环、延长航程）而非短途运输条件。
summary.zht: 中國BESS電芯和模組製造商須依據國際運輸公約對出口貨物遵守UN 38.3。中國製造商通常持有來自CNAS認可測試實驗室（如UL、SGS、Bureau Veritas、TÜV或CAICT）的UN 38.3測試報告和測試摘要。中國BESS出口商通常也針對國際貨運提供IEC 62281合規證明。自2020年1月1日起要求的UN 38.3測試摘要須涵蓋所運輸的特定電芯或電池類型。來自認可實驗室的中國產地UN 38.3測試摘要可用於依據IMDG規則運往萬那杜的海運貨物——主要差距在於文件範圍和時效性，以及確保包裝適合長途太平洋海運（更高濕度、溫度循環、延長航程）而非短途運輸條件。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test reports and test summaries from CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories (CAICT, UL China, SGS China, Bureau Veritas China, TÜV Rheinland China) — acceptable for IMDG Code compliance on Vanuatu sea freight if test summary covers the specific cell/battery type being shipped
IEC 62281:2019 — commonly certified by Chinese exporters for international transport

gap.en: The core gap for UN 38.3 is documentation scope and currency — not standard equivalence. UN 38.3 is a universal requirement and Chinese-origin test summaries from accredited laboratories are accepted for Vanuatu-bound sea freight. However, Vanuatu-specific transport considerations create additional gaps: (a) the UN 38.3 test summary must cover the specific cell model (chemistry, capacity, format) being exported — a summary for a different cell or module is not transferable; (b) any cell design change since the original UN 38.3 testing triggers a reassessment requirement; (c) module-level and battery-pack-level assemblies may require separate UN 38.3 assessment; (d) long-distance Pacific sea freight from China to Port Vila (typically 3–6 weeks via transhipment hubs such as Brisbane, Auckland, or Fiji) subjects BESS cells to sustained tropical heat and high humidity during transit — verify that packaging and State-of-Charge (SoC) management during sea freight are designed for Pacific voyage conditions, not short-haul delivery; (e) Port Vila's port handling capacity is limited — coordinate with a freight forwarder experienced in Pacific DG cargo handling and confirm IMDG documentation requirements with the shipping line before booking; (f) customs duties and import VAT (Vanuatu Value-Added Tax, currently 15%) apply to BESS equipment imports — verify current tariff classification with Vanuatu Customs.
gap.zh: UN 38.3的核心差距在于文件范围和时效性——而非标准等效性。UN 38.3是普遍要求，来自认可实验室的中国产地测试摘要可用于运往瓦努阿图的海运货物。然而，瓦努阿图专属运输考量产生了额外差距：（a）UN 38.3测试摘要须涵盖所出口的特定电芯型号（化学体系、容量、规格）——针对不同电芯或模组的测试摘要不可转用；（b）自最初UN 38.3测试以来的任何电芯设计变更均触发重新评估要求；（c）模组和电池包级别的组件若按国际运输法规定义构成电池，可能需要单独进行UN 38.3评估；（d）从中国至维拉港的长途太平洋海运（通常经由布里斯班、奥克兰或斐济等中转枢纽约需3-6周）使BESS电芯在运输过程中持续暴露于热带高温和高湿环境——核实包装和海运期间的荷电状态（SoC）管理是否针对太平洋航程条件而非短途配送进行设计；（e）维拉港港口装卸能力有限——与熟悉太平洋危险货物装卸的货运代理协调，并在订舱前向船公司确认IMDG文件要求；（f）进口关税和增值税（瓦努阿图增值税，现行税率15%）适用于BESS设备进口——与瓦努阿图海关核实现行关税归类。
gap.zht: UN 38.3的核心差距在於文件範圍和時效性——而非標準等效性。UN 38.3是普遍要求，來自認可實驗室的中國產地測試摘要可用於運往萬那杜的海運貨物。然而，萬那杜專屬運輸考量產生了額外差距：（a）UN 38.3測試摘要須涵蓋所出口的特定電芯型號（化學體系、容量、規格）——針對不同電芯或模組的測試摘要不可轉用；（b）自最初UN 38.3測試以來的任何電芯設計變更均觸發重新評估要求；（c）模組和電池包級別的組件若按國際運輸法規定義構成電池，可能需要單獨進行UN 38.3評估；（d）從中國至維拉港的長途太平洋海運（通常經由布里斯班、奧克蘭或斐濟等中轉樞紐約需3-6週）使BESS電芯在運輸過程中持續暴露於熱帶高溫和高濕環境——核實包裝和海運期間的荷電狀態（SoC）管理是否針對太平洋航程條件而非短途配送進行設計；（e）維拉港港口裝卸能力有限——與熟悉太平洋危險貨物裝卸的貨運代理協調，並在訂艙前向船公司確認IMDG文件要求；（f）進口關稅和增值稅（萬那杜增值稅，現行稅率15%）適用於BESS設備進口——與萬那杜海關核實現行關稅歸類。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory under international maritime law for all lithium battery imports to Vanuatu by sea — IMDG Code applies universally with no Vanuatu-specific exemption from UN 38.3 requirements
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under international transport conventions for all lithium battery export shipments from China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 transport compliance is universal — a Chinese-origin test summary from an accredited laboratory is accepted for Vanuatu sea freight under the IMDG Code, provided it covers the specific cell model and is current. The primary risks are: scope mismatch (wrong cell model or capacity in the summary), an outdated summary after a cell design change, and packaging inadequate for long-distance Pacific sea freight conditions (sustained tropical heat, humidity, and extended voyage duration from China to Port Vila via transhipment). Engage a dangerous-goods freight forwarder experienced in Pacific island cargo handling to confirm IMDG documentation, packaging, and Port Vila port DG handling requirements before shipment. Verify Vanuatu customs tariff classification and applicable import VAT (currently 15%) for BESS equipment before contract pricing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3运输合规是普遍要求——依据IMDG规则，来自认可实验室的中国产地测试摘要可用于瓦努阿图海运货物，前提是涵盖特定电芯型号且保持最新状态。主要风险为：范围不匹配（测试摘要中电芯型号或容量有误）、电芯设计变更后测试摘要过期，以及包装不适合长途太平洋海运条件（从中国经中转至维拉港的持续热带高温、高湿和延长航程）。请聘请熟悉太平洋岛屿货运处理的危险品货运代理，在出货前确认IMDG文件、包装及维拉港危险货物处理要求。在合同定价前核实BESS设备的瓦努阿图海关关税归类及适用进口增值税（现行税率15%）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3運輸合規是普遍要求——依據IMDG規則，來自認可實驗室的中國產地測試摘要可用於萬那杜海運貨物，前提是涵蓋特定電芯型號且保持最新狀態。主要風險為：範圍不匹配（測試摘要中電芯型號或容量有誤）、電芯設計變更後測試摘要過期，以及包裝不適合長途太平洋海運條件（從中國經中轉至維拉港的持續熱帶高溫、高濕和延長航程）。請聘請熟悉太平洋島嶼貨運處理的危險品貨運代理，在出貨前確認IMDG文件、包裝及維拉港危險貨物處理要求。在合同定價前核實BESS設備的萬那杜海關關稅歸類及適用進口增值稅（現行稅率15%）。
